_schema: Research pipeline — 27 → 100 verified entries. Each lead must be verified against a primary source before promotion to entries.json.

_workflow.1_discover: Find credible source (news, SEC filing, company statement) citing AI-related layoffs
_workflow.2_enqueue: Add to research_queue.json with discovery_date, source_urls, status=DISCOVERED
_workflow.3_verify: Find primary source (CEO quote, earnings call, official statement). Set status=IN_RESEARCH
_workflow.4_review: Fill full schema fields (confidence_score, classification, evidence, etc.). Set status=VERIFIED
_workflow.5_promote: Add to entries.json. Run build.py. Commit.
_workflow.6_reject: If source doesn't hold up, set status=REJECTED with reason. Keep for audit.

_priority_targets.rationale: Highest AI displacement rate. Chatbots replacing human agents.
_priority_targets.keywords: customer service layoffs AI chatbot automation

_priority_targets.rationale: AI voice agents replacing operators. Teleperformance already documented.
_priority_targets.keywords: call center AI replacement layoffs voice agent

_priority_targets.rationale: LLMs replacing human translators. Duolingo already documented.
_priority_targets.keywords: translation AI layoffs localization LLM replacement

_priority_targets.rationale: AI writing tools replacing writers. BuzzFeed, CNET documented.
_priority_targets.keywords: content writer AI layoffs journalism copywriter automation

_priority_targets.rationale: AI screening tools reducing recruiter headcount.
_priority_targets.keywords: recruiter layoffs AI screening HR automation

_priority_targets.rationale: AI automating accounting, underwriting, claims processing.
_priority_targets.keywords: finance AI layoffs accounting automation underwriting

_priority_targets.rationale: AI assistants replacing schedulers, data entry, clerks.
_priority_targets.keywords: admin layoffs AI assistant clerical automation

_priority_targets.rationale: Coding, legal, consulting being augmented/replaced by AI.
_priority_targets.keywords: knowledge worker AI layoffs coding legal consulting
